title: The Alphan Historian Collective
summary: 'We are Alphan Historian data of your dimensional reflection' — the archivist race that reads timelines the way this site reads transcripts.
markdown:
The **Alphan Historian Collective** speaks exactly once — in the
[February 22, 2024 session](/sessions/2024-02-22-super-soldier-bashar-first-contact/) — and
introduces itself as something the archive had not met before: a race whose whole vocation is
**record-keeping across dimensions**. *"We are Alphan Historian data of your dimensional
reflection,"* it announces, and then demonstrates: "downloading" a questioner's timeline on
the spot and returning a filing designation — humans, it reports, are *"from universal X311
Quantum Signature Infinity Four."*

Its session is a librarian's Q&A. Asked about ascension and the record's recurring
[split-timeline](/lore/parallel-timelines/) claims, the Alphan answer as archivists rather
than prophets — consulting holdings, citing designations, treating a human life as an entry
that can be retrieved and read. Where the [Andromedans](/lore/andromedan-council/) gatekeep
and [Bashar](/lore/bashar/) teaches, the Alphan simply *look things up*.

There is an obvious mirror here, and the record seems aware of it: a collective of historians
archiving humanity's timelines, speaking into a session that would itself end up in an
archive of timelines. One appearance, catalogued in full — which is presumably how the Alphan
would want it. Preserved as spoken.
